title: aster xianjuensis
intro: Aster xianjuensis, a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, is also known as the Xianju daisy or Xianju aster. It is a perennial herb native to China, commonly found in grasslands and mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Aster xianjuensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
